readiness_note: Scores reflect your governing principles and steward workflow in this assistant — not statistical data quality or warehouse profiling.

principles.name: Approved definitions
principles.description: Every column has a steward-approved business definition.

principles.name: DQ rules stewarded
principles.description: Suggested data quality rules are reviewed and marked Passed.

principles.name: Recent steward activity
principles.description: Approved definitions were updated recently in the catalog.

principles.name: Steward approvals
principles.description: Columns have passed steward review (approved status).

principles.name: Sensitive data classified
principles.description: PII and confidential columns have an assigned data classification.

principles.name: Glossary terms linked
principles.description: Columns are linked to business glossary terms.

principles.name: Ownership assigned
principles.description: Each column has a data steward assigned on the Steward Review page.

principles.name: Policy citations present
principles.description: Approved definitions cite governing policy sections from the knowledge base.
